meta.title: On the Eastern Orthodox Doctrine of Theosis
meta.author: Pastor Joshua Schooping

questions.question: According to the lecture, Gregory Palamas's theology was codified as authoritative Eastern Orthodox teaching especially through councils held in which years?
The speaker cites the 2016 Council of Crete encyclical to illustrate what point about Eastern Orthodoxy?
options: That the Filioque was formally accepted by all Orthodox churches
That theosis was condemned as a Western innovation
That monasticism was abolished on Mount Athos
That later councils after the seven ecumenical councils can be treated as having universal authority
questions.answer: That later councils after the seven ecumenical councils can be treated as having universal authority

questions.question: Norman Russell's academic book on Orthodox theosis, discussed in the lecture, is titled:
options: Fellow Workers with God: Orthodox Thinking on Theosis
The Mystical Theology of the East
questions.answer: Fellow Workers with God: Orthodox Thinking on Theosis

questions.question: Which item is NOT listed in the lecture as one of Norman Russell's four factors behind the modern rise of theosis language?
options: The re-engagement of Orthodox scholars with early Greek fathers
The discovery of the Dead Sea Scrolls in Jordan
questions.answer: The discovery of the Dead Sea Scrolls in Jordan

questions.question: Who compiled the Philokalia from Mount Athos manuscripts, according to the lecture?
options: Macarius of Corinth and Nicodemus of the Holy Mountain
Gregory Palamas and Mark of Ephesus
questions.answer: Macarius of Corinth and Nicodemus of the Holy Mountain

questions.question: The Philokalia was first published in Venice in which year?
The lecture dates the first volume of the complete English Philokalia (Palmer, Sherrard, Ware) to approximately:
Vladimir Soloviev's Lectures on Godmanhood, mentioned as part of the Russian factor, were given in which period?
Archimandrite George, whose monastic treatment of theosis the speaker highlights, is abbot of which monastery?
options: Monastery of St. Catherine at Sinai
Holy Monastery of St. Gregorios on Mount Athos
questions.answer: Holy Monastery of St. Gregorios on Mount Athos

questions.question: In Archimandrite George's account (as summarized), which three parts of the psyche must be cleansed before receiving grace and deification?
options: The body, the soul, and the spirit only
The intelligent, the passionate, and the desiring
questions.answer: The intelligent, the passionate, and the desiring

questions.question: In the lecture, the Greek term theoria refers to:
options: A legal theory of church canons
The doctrine of the Trinity alone
Vision or contemplative sight of God in the progression toward deification
questions.answer: Vision or contemplative sight of God in the progression toward deification

questions.question: Hesychasm, in this lecture, is especially associated with which practice?
options: The Jesus prayer repeated with inward attention
Icon painting according to strict rubrics
Fasting from all animal products on Wednesdays
questions.answer: The Jesus prayer repeated with inward attention

questions.question: Georgios Mantzaridis is cited for tying which theme to Palamas's teaching on deification?
options: The theme of uncreated light at the heart of Palamite teaching
questions.answer: The theme of uncreated light at the heart of Palamite teaching

questions.question: According to Palamas (as quoted in the lecture), Mary is described as forming:
options: The boundary between the Old and New Testaments only
The boundary between created and uncreated nature
The seventh ecumenical council's chief decree
The essence of the Holy Spirit
questions.answer: The boundary between created and uncreated nature

questions.question: The speaker quotes Norman Russell describing union with God as:
options: An optional devotion for monastics only
Identical to water baptism in the Jordan River
The final stage of theosis attained by ascetical and contemplative ascent
questions.answer: The final stage of theosis attained by ascetical and contemplative ascent

questions.question: The lecture credits which figure with translating the Philokalia into a more accessible Russian in the 19th century?
questions.answer: St. Theophan the Recluse

questions.question: Russell contrasts Archimandrite Christophoros Stoupoulos (late 1960s) with the average Orthodox believer of roughly which earlier period?
questions.answer: About a decade earlier (1950s)

questions.question: The vision of the uncreated light, in the lecture's summary of monastic teaching, is said to be seen by:
options: Very few people in each generation who are very advanced
questions.answer: Very few people in each generation who are very advanced

questions.question: Panagia, as explained in the lecture, means:
options: All-holy / Most Holy (in reference to Mary)
The council of bishops in Crete
questions.answer: All-holy / Most Holy (in reference to Mary)

questions.question: The Council of Crete encyclical passage cited in the lecture emphasizes human participation in:
options: The created energies of the cosmos
The essence of God as identical with human nature
questions.answer: The uncreated divine energies

questions.question: The lecture names which 20th-century Romanian theologian in connection with translating Philokalia material?
questions.answer: Dumitru Stăniloae

questions.question: The Hesychast controversy tied to Palamas is located in the lecture in which city?
questions.answer: Thessalonica (Thessaloniki)

questions.question: Elder Ephraim is mentioned in the lecture in connection with:
options: Describing Jesus prayer repetition in an almost machine-like, detached way
questions.answer: Describing Jesus prayer repetition in an almost machine-like, detached way

questions.question: The speaker draws several Palamas quotations on Mary from his homily on which theme?
questions.answer: Mary's Entrance into the Temple

questions.question: At the end of the lecture, which liturgical refrain about Mary is highlighted as repeated devotionally alongside the Jesus prayer?
questions.answer: Most Holy Theotokos, save us
